scope: Wave 1-13 Procore data-layer current-vs-target posture and primary remediation prompt assignment under the active Wave 13 roadmap-update package.

matrix.moduleOrWave: PCC Shared Foundations / SPFx Shell Frame / Backend Read-Model Foundation
matrix.currentProcorePosture: fixture-first; no Procore-derived signals in core read models; sourceStatus vocabulary in place but not Procore-specific
matrix.targetProcorePosture: Procore-aware source-lineage and degraded-state vocabulary; envelope/sourceStatus handling for mapping-missing, permission-denied, tool-disabled, stale, rate-limited, endpoint-deprecated, object-inaccessible; no live Procore runtime
remediationActions: Add Procore-aware source-lineage and degraded-state vocabulary where read models can later consume Procore-derived signals
Add envelope/sourceStatus handling for mapping-missing, permission-denied, tool-disabled, stale, rate-limited, endpoint-deprecated, object-inaccessible
Do not introduce live Procore runtime

matrix.currentProcorePosture: fixture-first; partial Procore awareness in priority-actions adapter; no mapping/sync surface
matrix.targetProcorePosture: fixture-backed Procore mapping status and sync-health cards; operational-signal card for open/overdue RFIs, submittals, observations, punch, daily-log completeness, drawing/spec currency; source-of-record and freshness labels
remediationActions: Add fixture-backed Procore mapping status and sync-health cards
Add operational-signal card for open/overdue RFIs, submittals, observations, punch, daily-log completeness, and drawing/spec currency
Add source-of-record and freshness labels

matrix.currentProcorePosture: rail lanes and metadata in place; no Procore-derived priority candidates
matrix.targetProcorePosture: Procore-derived priority action candidates with source-lineage and auto-close/stale behavior; Procore object remains Procore-owned; PCC action is derived
remediationActions: Add Procore-derived priority action candidates with source-lineage and auto-close/stale behavior
Maintain no source mutation; Procore object remains Procore-owned while PCC action is derived

matrix.currentProcorePosture: preview/read-only; partial Procore-bound test fixture references; no directory comparison surface
matrix.targetProcorePosture: read-only Procore Directory Comparison posture with mismatch categories (in Procore not PCC, in PCC not Procore, inactive, company/role mismatch); no auto-grant of SharePoint access from Procore directory data
remediationActions: Add read-only Procore Directory Comparison posture
No auto-granting SharePoint access from Procore directory data
Add mismatch categories: in Procore not PCC, in PCC not Procore, inactive, company/role mismatch

matrix.currentProcorePosture: three-lane fixture-backed surface; no Procore document/drawing/spec/photo metadata seam; no document-currency signal
matrix.targetProcorePosture: Procore documents/drawings/specs/photos represented as metadata, object links, and evidence only; no recursive file mirror, no binary replication, no SharePoint copy of Procore file tree; document-currency signal contract in place
remediationActions: Represent Procore documents/drawings/specs/photos as metadata/object links/evidence only
No recursive file mirror, no binary replication, no SharePoint copy of Procore file tree
Add document-currency signal contract

matrix.currentProcorePosture: framework contracts and readiness domains in place; no Procore-derived readiness impacts; no stale-Procore guard on readiness posture
matrix.targetProcorePosture: Procore-derived readiness impacts (unresolved RFI, overdue submittal, open observation, open punch, missing daily log, stale drawing/spec, unmapped Procore project); stale Procore data cannot silently support green readiness posture
remediationActions: Add Procore-derived readiness impacts: unresolved RFI, overdue submittal, open observation, open punch, missing daily log, stale drawing/spec, unmapped Procore project
Stale Procore data cannot silently support green readiness posture

matrix.currentProcorePosture: startup/safety/closeout module in place; no source-confidence scoring tied to Procore mapping/sync/freshness
matrix.targetProcorePosture: startup/safety/closeout readiness bound to Procore supporting context through fixtures only; source-confidence scoring based on mapping/sync health/freshness
remediationActions: Bind startup/safety/closeout readiness to Procore supporting context through fixtures only
Add source-confidence scoring based on mapping/sync health/freshness

matrix.currentProcorePosture: permit lifecycle and AHJ launcher fixture-driven; no Procore object-link evidence
matrix.targetProcorePosture: Procore object-link evidence for drawings/specs/photos/daily logs/observations/RFIs/Procore inspections; PCC ownership preserved for Permit Log and Required Inspection Log unless the specific inspection object is generated in Procore
remediationActions: Add Procore object-link evidence for drawings/specs/photos/daily logs/observations/RFIs/Procore inspections
Preserve PCC ownership of Permit Log and Required Inspection Log unless the specific inspection object is generated in Procore

matrix.currentProcorePosture: fixture-driven; no comparison against Procore actual workflow ownership
matrix.targetProcorePosture: comparison of PCC planned responsibility against Procore actual workflow ownership; Procore assignments do not overwrite PCC responsibility-matrix records
remediationActions: Compare PCC planned responsibility against Procore actual workflow ownership
Do not allow Procore assignments to overwrite PCC responsibility matrix records

matrix.moduleOrWave: Constraints Log (Make-Ready Constraint & Risk Exposure Center)
matrix.currentProcorePosture: fixture-first constraints/risk surface; no Procore-derived candidates; no human-acceptance gate for derived constraints
matrix.targetProcorePosture: Procore-derived constraint/risk/exposure candidate examples; human acceptance required before a Procore-derived candidate becomes a PCC-owned constraint; legal/claim/delay boundary preserved
remediationActions: Add Procore-derived constraint/risk/exposure candidate examples
Human acceptance required before a Procore-derived candidate becomes a PCC-owned constraint
Preserve legal/claim/delay boundary

matrix.currentProcorePosture: closed at HEAD 5e677d996080e829194cc820284de2bc12cd34bd; imported-lineage / reference-only Procore states (procore-commitment-pending, procore-commitment-created); no live Procore HTTP, write-back, SDK adoption, or commitment authoring; guardrail tests assert structural absence of write-verbs, source-of-truth claims, and SPFx-to-Procore call surface
matrix.targetProcorePosture: use Procore commitments / change events / submittals / vendors only as object links, curated summaries, reconciliation evidence, or derived signals; no Procore commitment / PO / subcontract / SOV / CCO / invoice / payment write-back; no Sage posting or accounting truth derived from Procore; verify shared 13C-13E contracts are reused without divergence (no parallel local Procore type definitions)
remediationActions: Use Procore commitments/change events/submittals/vendors only as object links, curated summaries, reconciliation evidence, or derived signals
No Procore commitment/PO/subcontract/SOV/CCO/invoice/payment write-back
No Sage posting or accounting truth derived from Procore
Patch existing Wave 13 contracts/tests if current repo truth lacks the common Procore data-layer contract references
